title: medieval armory
description: get medieval weapons by renaming swords and shields
body:
rename your sword or shield to make it look like a medieval weapon of your choice

here is how to do this:

!!ALL RENAMES ARE CASE SENSITIVE!!

  you can rename a sword (iron tier or higher) to:
  - longsword (like a vanilla sword but longer)
  - montante (like a longsword but even longer)
  - rapier
  - parrying dagger (like a rapier but short)
  - saber
  - shashka (like a saber but no hand protection)
  - katana
  - dagger (like a vanilla sword but shorter)
  - warhammer
  
  add diamond or netherite in front of the rename to get a diamond or netherite version of the
  weapon

    (but only if your sword is high enough tier, for example you can't rename a diamond sword to netherite rapier but you can name a netherite sword diamond rapier)
  
  you can rename a shield to
  - buckler
  - parrying dagger
  - dagger
  
  you can add diamond or netherite in front of the rename to get a diamond or netherite version
